name: Stabilis Solutions, Inc.
summary: Stabilis Solutions, Inc. (SLNG) is an energy company focused on liquefied natural gas (LNG) solutions. The company provides LNG-related products and services, operating in the small-scale LNG market. Based on the 10-K filing's Item 1 reference, the company delivers LNG supply and distribution services, though specific product details are not elaborated in the provided excerpt.
